message: Jake
Yuriko
− The Next Day −
S
Boss, are you listening?
Boss?
Hmm, yeah, what's up?
That's not the point. You look like you've lost your motivation since this morning.
Are you okay?
Yeah. I'm fine.
Something happened yesterday, didn’t it? Maybe things aren’t going well with Jennifer?
Why would you say that?
Oh, spot on? I guess I really do have a talent for being a detective. Hehe.
Welcome back!
You're full of energy, huh?
Of course, I’m young!
Thanks for your hard work.
Boss, you really look exhausted.

With a rent this low, it’s only fitting that the interior is just as filthy. Honestly, I'd be grateful if they could at least fix the elevator.
You and I
are the only ones here; but honestly, too many requests for a small office like ours would be overwhelming.
Just the bare essentials.
My desk, phone, reception set, and,
there's hardly anything else besides the computer.
She seems put-together, yet there's something a bit off about her. How can someone like her manage in New York?
Asian types are quite popular in New York. You’d think there would be plenty of guys hitting on her.
So why haven’t I heard any scandalous rumors?
With that bubbly expression, she looks like she could still be in high school.
Yet she is competent, which is impressive.
Boss, let’s stay cheerful and positive, no matter what happens.
I don’t want to hear that from you, someone who seems far removed from worries.
Oh, how rude! I’ve got a mountain of issues weighing on me, you know. But I won’t tell you what they are, so sorry!
Since we’re out of requests anyway, I’d like to go on a trip when things settle down a bit.
Sure, go ahead, even tomorrow if you want.
It won’t be that easy, you know. But I may take advantage of your offer soon.
Hehe, where should I go?
I haven’t heard from Meryl at all.
If she’s gone all the way to Japan to perform that hour of the ox ritual,
that would be scary.
Normal people don’t do that stuff.
Oh, you’re mocking me!
It’s okay, I swear that I won’t get killed, nor will I kill Guy.
Of course. It would be troublesome if that happened.
Meryl isn't a child, either.
Meryl killing Gai, that’s absurd.
That can’t be true, right?
Kristy couldn’t possibly be a murderer.
I heard Kristy went to meet Ginny, Cindy, and Jennifer.
Isn’t that related to Gai?
Yeah, I think it's probably about Gai. But, Ginny is missing, and Cindy was murdered.
No way!? Boss, you’re overthinking things lately. You’re being super negative.
Kristy seems a lot better since Gai returned. There's no need to worry now.
I think so, but I can't help but feel uneasy.
When we talk about that murder case,
Is that what you mean? Speaking of which, something changed when we saw the knife at the restaurant.
That’s why I feel uneasy.
But,
Kristy being involved in murder,
It’s probably just your imagination. Really.
Tony doesn’t seem like the culprit.
My sixth sense was off this time.
Hmm.
We don't know anything for sure yet.
So you think Tony's the culprit?
N-no.
As of now, I don’t think so.
Sigh.
Oh, it’s something even the Boss can figure out.
I might have become an idiot.
I have to apologize when I see Tony.
Could it be that something happened at the party?
I mean, that face looks criminal.
It's okay; I'll apologize next time we meet.
Tch.
I definitely thought Tonny was suspicious.
Guy seems to be doing well, right? You wouldn’t think he was someone who was locked away.
Oh really? He’s active, huh.
The media is strange, isn’t it? They were calling him the culprit just a while ago.
Now Kristy can have her mind at ease, and the boss won’t be inconvenienced anymore. Congratulations.
Are you mad or something? That way of speaking.
Just isn’t like you.
I’m not mad or anything.
But, I don’t know, it just feels weird. This world.
We don’t need to worry about Kristy anymore.
Did you get a call from Jennifer?
No. Are you waiting for her to call?
Nah, not really.
Phew.
Hmm, the boss isn’t that cheap either.
Hehe.
If you’re curious, you should go see him. I think that’s the best thing to do.
I don’t really care, so it’s fine.
The boss is cute, huh? Hehe.
I don’t know! How about going to see him now?
With the incident at the party, it’s clearly not normal. It wouldn’t be surprising if he does something.
Why do I have to worry about Meryl too?
What’s the director doing? She’s his mistress.
I still can’t take my eyes off Meryl.
Even though we’re not strangers, from here on, it’s Guy’s job. Unless Kristy isn’t doing anything.
Looks like she hasn’t gone for counseling anymore, but has she really gotten better?
Is it okay to just leave her alone?
Speaking of serial killings, Tonny is probably innocent. The other drugs and snuff videos aren't my department.
I bet you want to leave New York soon. You probably don't want to be Gordon's lapdog any longer.
It might be a waste to keep chasing Tony. You can't trust a word that guy says.
It seems Guy was plotting to use BAM to break off his engagement with Kristy, but if that's just a camouflage...
Then he would kill off the women who cling to him around Kristy.
That story seems far-fetched.
Was Guy intending to break up with Kristy?
It looked like their relationship was going well. What could be the reason?
It feels like there's still something she's hiding from me.
Jennifer told me she had grown cold towards me. But isn't it Jennifer who's actually grown cold?
It's definitely you whose attitude has changed since the party, Jennifer.
Thinking back, I've been swept along by her pace this whole time. I never intended to be her boyfriend.
What does she really think of me?
What is it, really, between Jennifer and me?
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
